violations.claim: VIOLATION: if createDefault() registers no generators, getGeneratorNames() returns [],
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P6
; LINE: 98
; VIOLATION: if createDefault() registers no generators, getGeneratorNames() returns [],
; join(", ") returns "", and the log prints "  Signal generators: " with a blank value.
(declare-const generator_count Int)
(declare-const join_len Int)
; Code transition: createDefault() called — generator_count >= 0 (no lower bound enforced)
(assert (>= generator_count 0))
; Code transition: Array.join on empty array = "" (length 0)
(assert (=> (= generator_count 0) (= join_len 0)))
; Violation: no guard `if (generator_count > 0)` before the log
(assert (= generator_count 0))
(assert (= join_len 0))
(check-sat)
